name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something broke or behaves unexpectedly

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open the game at https://shifulegend.github.io/spike-sprint/
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behaviour
What should have happened?

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened?

## Screenshots / Recording
If applicable, add a screenshot or screen recording.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 125, Safari 17, Firefox 127)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17, Android 14)
- **Device:** (e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Pixel 8)

## Additional Context
Anything else that might help (e.g. only happens at high speed, only on mobile, etc.)
